definition: Y4 재현(계층비용 적용) = 새 기준선. 볼륨 top100 + 펀딩히스토리 12mo -- universe -membership rule identical to research.wave11_yield.fetch_y11.expand_universe_y4; only the cost model (tiered slippage + $2M 유동성 하한, 기존 알트 일괄 3bp 대체) differs from Y4's own run.

metadata.source_engine: research.wave12_frontier.engine12.run_candidate (copies research.wave10_carry100.engine.run_fixed_fraction_portfolio's per-timestamp bookkeeping unmodified; only the tiered point-in-time cost/liquidity model differs)
